title: Explosive Sulfur Cubes
description: Allows explosive Sulfur Cubes to explode on contact at certain velocity
body:
## Description
Allows explosive Sulfur Cubes explode on contact with either blocks or entities. Power of explosion depends on cube's speed

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1V0VOk1l/images/efb8ee2dae5327f39baa36ed0b9fd6ae2c41700e.gif)

## Technical stuff
Mod checks if blocks can explode in same way vanilla does for priming Sulfur Cubes. So anything that can be primed will explode on contact

Mod also comes with config (called `explosive_sulfur_cubes.json` in config folder) with following fields:
- `explosionPowerMultiplier` - controls power of explosion
- `speedThreshold` - minimal cube's speed required for explosion to trigger
